title: Winter Wilderness Survival (COAL)
immediate_steps: Remember COAL: Clean, Overheating, Avoid loose, Layers
Avoid Overheating (sweat will freeze; take off layers before doing heavy work)
Wear clothes loose (tight clothes restrict blood flow)
Dress in Layers (base, insulating, and wind/waterproof outer shell)
Protect your extremities (head, hands, feet) as they lose heat fastest
Build a snow cave or quinzee if snow is deep enough, as snow is an excellent insulator
avoid: Do not eat snow directly (it lowers your core temperature; melt it first)
Do not wear cotton if it gets wet ('cotton kills')
